This is a complaint about a 2021 model-year sedan, vehicle identification number ending in 4471. On the morning of January 9th, 2025, around 7:40 AM, I was driving on the eastbound entrance ramp to Interstate 80 near exit 142 when the steering wheel suddenly locked up while I was accelerating from about 35 to 50 miles per hour. I could not turn the wheel for approximately three seconds. I was able to coast onto the right shoulder. There was no warning light on the dashboard before the event. The dealership had performed a recall service on the steering column on November 30th, 2024. After the lock-up incident I have noticed two more brief stiffness events on January 14th and January 16th in normal city driving. I have not crashed and no one was injured but I am reporting because the recall repair clearly did not resolve the defect.
